channel.title: The Strange Archive
channel.description: Urban legends, internet folklore, classic myths, strange places, mythic creatures, and mysterious stories from around the world.

item.title: The Vanishing Hitchhiker: Why This Roadside Urban Legend Never Disappeared
item.description: A quiet passenger, an ordinary road, and an empty seat explain why this roadside urban legend keeps returning.

item.title: The Backrooms and the Birth of a Digital Labyrinth
item.description: How an empty yellow room became one of the internet era's most recognizable digital legends.

item.title: Why Dragons Look Different Across the World
item.description: A quiet look at why dragon stories change shape across cultures, climates, and old fears.

item.title: The Forest That Appears in Too Many Old Stories
item.description: Some versions say the forest is a border, a warning, or a place where ordinary rules thin out.

item.title: The Island No One Could Map Twice
item.description: A strange-place file about disappearing islands, uncertain maps, and rumors that survive the tide.

item.title: The Old Bell That Rang Before Anyone Touched It
item.description: A careful mystery note about a village bell, repeated claims, and the space between record and rumor.

item.title: How a Single Image Became an Internet Legend
item.description: Where one image began to gather captions, retellings, and the uneasy force of online folklore.
